title: The Escape from Egghead Tightens
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Emeth, Unknown person #12, Luffy as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her ferocity always sends shivers down my spine!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep going!! So what if they're freaking giants?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wasn't that boar just behind us a second ago?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's great. Now we just gotta worry about boarding the ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said it. It's high time we set sail!! Gaba BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have one last message I wish to impart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is for those of you who are scattered all across the world...

dialogue.speaker: Emeth
dialogue.text: Yes, it is the very "iron giant"...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which rampaged through Mary Geoise 200 years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: there can be no doubt of that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...those of you who carry the letter "D." In your name.

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
